steps.title: Build the linear model
steps.content:
The first $4$ hours cost $250$, and each additional hour adds $55$. For $x>4$, the total cost is the flat amount plus $55$ times the number of additional hours beyond $4$.
$$y=250+55(x-4)$$

steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Distribute and combine constants to put the model in slope-intercept form.
$$y=250+55x-220$$
$$y=55x+30$$
The answer is C.
